Niyam v2 — the design you approved, now real

Every image is the complete phone screen from a fresh install on the Pixel 9 emulator — the approved mockups, built. Compare against the frames you signed off: same gradients, same composition, same Outfit type, no Om.

1 · Welcome

Sunrise gradient under the clock (edge-to-edge), Outfit wordmark, filled orange button.

2 · Onboarding — Why are you here?

Floating cards on the gradient; the chosen one gets the orange outline.

3 · Onboarding — starter mantra

Three starters with meaning gists and read-time chips.

4 · Onboarding — your language

Nine options in native script, floating cards.

5 · Onboarding — what pulls you in

REAL app icons (Instagram, YouTube pulled live from the phone); letter circles for apps not installed.

6 · Permission flow

Icon circle, plain explanation, progress dashes showing where you are in the grant flow.

7 · Final permission step

Same treatment; copy polish still queued.

8 · Home

The approved frame, live: warm overline + gear, big Day-counter hero, floating mantra card, streak chips, filled library button, protection dot at the bottom.

9 · THE CORE FEATURE — overlay over YouTube

Captured with YouTube actually open underneath: mantra in Outfit, meaning, and the new 15-second countdown RING filling in orange. Continue stays dimmed until it completes.

10 · Library

Filter chips with soft shadows, floating mantra cards.

11 · Library — Gita filter on

Selected chip in the orange wash; 8 Gita verses.

12 · Mantra detail

Mantra + transliteration + meaning grouped in one floating card with a hairline divider; filled CTA.

13 · Settings

Rows grouped into floating section cards with line icons; appearance segments; notification toggle.

14 · Settings — dark

One tap on Dark…

15 · Home — dark

…and the whole app re-themes live: deep bottle-green gradient glowing at the top, same composition.

16 · Library — dark

Dark chips and cards, orange selection wash.

— 16 screens · suite 83/83 · engine untouched —
